scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend-react && npm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org && npm install --timeout=300000 --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build && cd .. && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && tsx watch --exclude ".cursor/**" --exclude ".vscode/**" --exclude ".idea/**" --exclude "node_modules/**" --exclude "frontend-react/node_modules/**" --exclude "frontend-react/dist/**" --exclude "dist/**" --exclude "public/**" --exclude "logs/**" --exclude "data/**" --exclude "browser_data/**" --exclude "temp_lovable_design/**" --exclude "uploads/**" --exclude "debug/**" --exclude "*.log" --exclude "*.md" --exclude ".git/**" --exclude "*.bat" --exclude "*.cmd" --exclude "ecosystem.config.cjs" --exclude "package-lock.json" --exclude "frontend-react/package-lock.json" src/index.ts
scripts.server: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.pm2:start: npm run clean && npm run build:frontend && npm run build && pm2 delete ecosystem.config.cjs 2>nul & pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.docker:build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build && node scripts/ensure-docker-chrome-pkg.cjs && docker build -t goofishcbot:latest .
scripts.docker:build:arm64: npm run build:frontend && npm run build && node scripts/ensure-docker-chrome-pkg.cjs && node scripts/docker-build-platform.cjs --platform linux/arm64 --tag goofishcbot:arm64 --context .
